overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a Japanese horror game featuring a schoolgirl in a sailor uniform exploring a dark traditional wooden building. The character moves through candle-lit corridors and rooms with bloodstains, creating an ominous atmosphere with mixed warm and cool lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: dark wooden corridor with paper screen doors

events.description: approaching doorway reveals brighter shrine room ahead with warm candlelight

agents.ego_description: walking cautiously through the dark corridor toward a lit doorway at the end of the hall

entered.detail: dark wooden panel walls lining both sides of the narrow corridor
traditional Japanese shoji screens on the right side of the corridor
lit candle on a stand providing sparse warm light

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a narrow dark wooden corridor illuminated by sparse candlelight. Paper screen doors line the walls as she approaches a doorway leading to a brighter area.

scene_state.functional_zone: shrine room with blood-stained tatami mats and wooden altar

camera pans down to reveal bloodstains on the tatami floor in the warm light

entered.detail: wooden altar with red drapery, candles, and religious artifacts against the back wall
straw mat flooring covered with red bloodstains and Japanese writing
red blood splatters and handprints covering the tatami mats
thick wooden support pillars on either side of the room

segments.scene_description: The character enters a traditional Japanese shrine room with tatami flooring covered in bloodstains. A wooden altar with candles and red drapery sits at the far end, illuminated by warm lantern light.

scene_state.functional_zone: wooden corridor with red markings on walls

events.description: exits the shrine room back into the dark corridor

agents.ego_description: turns around and exits the shrine room, returning to the narrow corridor

segments.scene_description: The character turns and exits the shrine room, returning to the narrow dark corridor. The walls show red markings or bloodstains as she proceeds.

passes wooden lockers and notices bloodstains on the wooden floor

agents.ego_description: walks through the blue-lit corridor, examining the surroundings including lockers and a whiteboard with writing

row of wooden lockers or cabinets along the left wall
white board with red writing or symbols on the right wall
simple wooden bench against the left wall

segments.scene_description: The character moves through a wider corridor illuminated by blue emergency lights. Wooden lockers line the walls and a whiteboard with writing is visible as she explores the area.

scene_state.functional_zone: small storage room with wooden shelves and boxes

events.description: enters a small storage room with shelves and boxes from the blue-lit area

agents.ego_description: enters the storage room and looks around at the shelves and boxes, moving toward the back

entered.detail: tall wooden shelving units filled with boxes and items
cardboard and wooden boxes stacked on the shelves
tall stand with lit candle providing warm light in the room

segments.scene_description: The character enters a small enclosed storage room containing wooden shelves stacked with boxes. The room is dimly lit by a single candle stand.

scene_state.functional_zone: open room with wooden platform and mixed lighting

events.description: exits storage room back to the larger blue-lit area
moves toward warmer lit area with wall-mounted candle lanterns

agents.ego_description: exits the storage room and walks through the larger area toward another doorway in the distance

entered.detail: raised wooden platform or stage in the center of the room
traditional wall-mounted lanterns with warm candlelight

segments.scene_description: The character exits the storage room and walks through a larger open space with a raised wooden platform. Blue ceiling lights mix with warm candlelight from wall lanterns as she approaches another doorway.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a dark wooden corridor that briefly opens into a blood-stained shrine before returning to the oppressive gloom of the hallway. It begins with the character navigating a narrow passage illuminated by sparse candlelight and lined with paper screen doors. As she moves forward, the scene expands into a traditional Japanese shrine room where warm lantern light reveals tatami flooring covered in bloodstains and a wooden altar draped in red. The camera then turns and exits the shrine, shifting back into the dimness of the corridor. Finally, the environment grows more ominous as the character proceeds past walls now marred by red markings and bloodstains.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a sterile, blue-lit corridor that transitions into a cramped storage space before opening into a larger, atmospherically lit hall. It begins with the character navigating a wide hallway lined with wooden lockers and a whiteboard, all bathed in the cold glow of blue emergency lights. As she moves forward, the scene shifts into a small, enclosed storage room where the blue light fades, replaced by the dim, flickering warmth of a single candle stand illuminating shelves of boxes. The camera then follows her as she exits the confined space and enters a larger open area featuring a raised wooden platform. Finally, the environment expands as the cool ceiling lights blend with the warm glow of wall lanterns, guiding her toward another doorway.
